purpose: Present chronological sequence of events so the reader understands how the situation evolved over time.
writingRules: Every event must have a date and title
Events grouped by phase or theme if more than 8 items
Causal links shown as arrows or connectors between events
Gaps longer than 6 months must be flagged with context
seoRules: Timeline section structured as ordered list for rich snippet eligibility
Key dates should appear in the first 50 words
Use schema.org Event markup for each entry
